steps.title: Use the tangent ratio
steps.content: For angle $y^{\circ}$ in the right triangle, tangent is opposite over adjacent. Identify the side opposite angle $y^{\circ}$ and the leg adjacent to it.

steps.title: Identify the right triangle and angle y°
steps.content: The right angle is at vertex R (bottom left corner). The angle y° is at vertex S (bottom right corner). From the diagram: QR = 5 (vertical leg) and RS = 7 (horizontal leg).

steps.title: From angle S, identify opposite and adjacent sides
steps.content:
For angle y° at vertex S:
  • Opposite side (across from angle S) = QR = 5
  • Adjacent side (next to angle S) = RS = 7
